title: Infinite Armada Chess
alt: Stockfish 16 suggests the unconventional opening 1. RuntimeError: Out of bounds memory access
transcript:
[A chess board in the starting position, except it extends further at the top and bottom, going beyond the panel. The extra squares are filled with queens of the sides' respective colors.]

[Caption below the panel:]
Infinite armada chess
explanation:
is a board game played between two players on an 8×8 chessboard. In standard chess, each player has 8 pawns and 8 other pieces: 2 rooks, 2 knights, 2 bishops, a queen, and a king.  are chess games in which the rules, board sizes, and/or piece behaviors are altered. In the chess variant presented here, a non-standard chessboard is used, which increases the number of ranks without limit in both directions. Each square beyond the 8 standard ranks is filled by an additional queen. The  is the most powerful piece on the chessboard, having the powers of a  and a  combined. With an infinite armada of queens, each player will have more resources to call on. Sometimes having a bunch of queens doesn't go very well, however.

In the title text,  is a  designed to evaluate a chessboard and find the best move.  However, it is designed to handle finite boards. In this scenario, Stockfish has encountered a runtime error and is displaying that instead of recommending an opening move. The runtime error in question, "RuntimeError: Out of bounds memory access", is unique to the cross-browser  implementations of , which suggests that the issue was that there was not enough memory to  an infinite board in a  window.

This comic was published in the middle of the , between the World Champion Ding Liren and the Challenger Gukesh Dommaraju.
